events.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
events.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday, known for her chart-topping music, iconic dance moves, and successful acting career.

angles.name: J.Lo's Legacy
angles.copy: From Fly Girl to global icon, Jennifer Lopez turns 57! What's your favourite J.Lo track or movie moment?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the iconic Rolling Stones frontman, Sir Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with its first broadcast, forever changing the music and television landscape. The first music video ever played was 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles.

angles.name: MTV's Impact
angles.copy: Remember when music television actually played music videos? 45 years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis' groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop history.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'. Which track still sounds absolutely biblical to you?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, becoming a defining moment of the counterculture generation.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. Imagine being there!

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: August 16th marks the 49th anniversary of the death of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: The King Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering The King. It's 49 years since we lost Elvis Presley, who would have been 91. His music lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's shooting
events.blurb: September 1st marks the anniversary of the shooting of influential rapper Tupac Shakur in Las Vegas, who later died on September 13, 1996. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur. It's the anniversary of the tragic shooting that led to his death, he would have been 55. His impact on music is undeniable.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: September 2nd marks the anniversary of the death of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970. He would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix. It's the anniversary of his passing, he would have been 84. Still influencing guitarists today.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on September 26, 1969, featuring classic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes the Sun'.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: The one with the zebra crossing! It's 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking as the voice of The Pretenders.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The iconic Oasis frontman and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger and the tunes. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single in the US on October 11, 1971, and as part of the album 'Imagine' on September 9, 1971 (US).

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon asked us to 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates globally for peace and unity. What does it mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod anniversary
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how people listened to music and putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Tunes
angles.copy: Remember the click wheel? 25 years ago, Apple dropped the first iPod, changing music forever. How many songs did you cram onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Forever
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From Connery to Craig, who is your definitive 007, and what's the best Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: October 9th marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' legendary songwriter and peace activist, John Lennon.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian, actor, and writer, best known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, John Cleese, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Python to Fawlty Towers, what's your favourite moment from a true British comedy legend?

events.title: The Beatles' 'White Album' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', was released on November 22, 1968, showcasing the band's diverse musical directions.

angles.name: White Album Wonders
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles dropped 'The White Album'. A sprawling masterpiece of musical diversity. Which track is your hidden gem from the double LP?
